defect: missing balancing dampers at branch takeoffs
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Terminations & balancing, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: missing balancing dampers at branch takeoffs. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: SMACNA, TAB reports.
title: Fault diagnosis: Terminations & balancing (commercial project)
